descriptionHtml:
Beneteau Oceanis Clipper 42 CC for sale 2004 | 2 Cabins Version | Tax Paid

If you’re searching for a versatile cruiser, the Beneteau Oceanis Clipper 42 CC for sale 2004, currently located in Licata, Italy, offers a comfortable blend of performance and liveability. This centre cockpit model, registered under the German flag, is well equipped for extended cruising as well as coastal hops, and she is in good condition, with recent updates carried out to several key systems.

The Beneteau Oceanis Clipper 42 CC for sale 2004 is a classic example of the brand’s commitment to safe, practical, and comfortable bluewater sailing.

The sailing equipment is comprehensive and recently upgraded. The rig was replaced in 2023, and the furling systems for the genoa and jib are new in 2024, reducing maintenance worries and making short-handed sailing more manageable. She’s fitted with roller furling mainsail, genoa, furling genoa, storm jib, and gennaker, offering options for different wind conditions.

(Autopilot, Radar, Plotter, Generatoor, AC, Bow thruster, Solar Panel, Sea Water Pump...)

Specifications:

  • Location: Licata, Italy
  • Flag of Registry: German
  • Length: 12.75 m
  • Beam: 3.91 m
  • Draft: 1.75 m
  • Weight: 9000 kg
  • Cruising Speed: 6 knots
  • Tanks: Fuel 250 l - Fresh water 500 l - Holding 2x60 l
  • Motor: Yanmar 4JH3TE, Diesel, 55 kW, 1800 hours
  • Cabins/Heads: 2 cabins, 2 heads
  • Sails: Roller furling mainsail, genoa, furling genoa, storm jib, gennaker
  • Electronics: Depth sounder, wind speed, navigation centre, plotter, autopilot, compass, GPS, VHF, radar, TV, DVD player, radio, CD player, cockpit speakers
  • Inside Equipment: Dishwasher, oven, microwave, marine head, refrigerator, battery charger, bow thruster, bilge pumps, air conditioning, heating, hot water, sea water pump
  • Electrical: Shore power, generator
  • Rigging: Steering wheel, electric winch, spinnaker pole
  • Outside: Teak cockpit/sidedecks, gangway, wind generator, solar panel, cockpit cushions/shower/table, swimming ladder, tender, liferaft
  • Covers: Bimini, cockpit cover, sprayhood

This Beneteau Oceanis Clipper 42 CC for sale 2004 is ready to sail and in good condition, with notable recent upgrades, making her a practical and inviting choice for those seeking to explore coastal or Mediterranean waters.

Contact for further details or viewings in Licata.
